title: Assistant Engineer (Career Conversion Programme)
description:
Duties and Responsibilities

1. Be aligned and act in accordance to SMRT's Vision, Mission, Service Standard and Core Values.

2. Ensure good understanding, knowledge and skills needed for all maintenance activities and provide support for staff training.

3. Lead and supervise a team of Technical Officer(s) to perform preventive, corrective, overhaul, troubleshooting, engineering analysis, investigation or any assigned maintenance activities on all rolling stocks, depot and workshop equipment.

4. Assist to plan and coordinate staff deployment and shift roster to optimise resources utilisation.

5. Verify and ensure all tasks executed by the team are in accordance to latest Work Instructions, Quality, Maintenance, Operational and Safety Procedures, and to ensure personal and peers’ safety at all times.

6. Ensure spares, tools and equipment used are in good condition and calibrated if necessary.

7. Perform train shunting activities and operate depot equipment, maintenance vehicles and maintenance equipment to support maintenance activities of the group.

8. Verify and ensure work records done by the team are updated factually, accurately and timely on Work Records Form and on the Maintenance Management System

9. Report immediately any abnormalities or practices observed that are not in accordance to Work Instructions, Quality, Maintenance, Operational and Safety Procedures.

10. Adopt KAIZEN methodology (5M, 5S & 5W) to eliminate 8 Wastes and improve Productivity and Value of work performed.

11. Provide support to staff, contractors or any other personnel who are required to perform work on depot and all rolling stocks.

12. To support the group during incidents, accidents and emergencies.

13. Ensure excellent housekeeping are maintained within all work areas.

14. Maintain a high level of work discipline and standards.

15. Perform any other task as assigned.

postedCompany.description:
As a leading operator of Singapore’s transportation network, SMRT does more than just Moving People to their destinations, we are also focused on Enhancing Lives – that of our commuters and employees.

Commuting forms an integral part of the day’s experience for many people, so we are constantly improving and innovating to enhance their journey experiences. As an SMRT employee, you will have the opportunity to be part of the team that makes the difference in the lives of the millions who use our network every day.

SMRT will enhance your life too, as you help us to be even better, through team spirit and a commitment to helping everyone improve themselves. We will guide and nurture you, and provide the best training for you to master your skills.
postedCompany.name: SMRT TRAINS LTD.
